session_label: Avenues 5+6 Ottoman provincial tezkires + Sufi tekke libraries (main-context replacement for lost Subagent C output)
current_status_note: Superseded for Ottoman-current-status purposes by probe_2026-05-11_ottoman_chunks_synthesis.json, which deepened this shallow site-restricted pass through four focused chunk probes.
scope: Probe Turkish institutional manuscript portals (yazmalar.gov.tr, Türkiye Yazma Eserler Başkanlığı yek.gov.tr, ISAM new home katalog.isam.org.tr, Milli Kütüphane dijital-kutuphane.mkutup.gov.tr, Diyanet yazmaeserler.diyanet.gov.tr) for any Cihanşah Qaraqoyunlu / Hakîkî witness not in v1.0 register. Includes Sufi tekke holdings (Konya Mevlana, Bektaşi-affiliated, Bursa where Yusuf Hakîkî Bursavi taught). Replaces the lost Subagent C output (API overload terminated the agent after 61 tool uses without writing the output file).
context_note: Subagent C (Ottoman provincial + Sufi) was launched and worked for approximately 32 minutes / 61 tool uses, then returned 'API Error: Overloaded' on its final summary write. No output file was written. This main-context probe is a tighter-scope replacement using site-restricted Google indexing rather than direct portal interaction.

method_summary.tier_1_url_discovery: WebSearch for current canonical yazmalar.gov.tr URL + identification of related Turkish institutional manuscript portals (yek.gov.tr parent, katalog.isam.org.tr ISAM new home, dijital-kutuphane.mkutup.gov.tr Milli Kütüphane manuscripts, yazmaeserler.diyanet.gov.tr Diyanet manuscripts).
method_summary.tier_2_direct_reachability: WebFetch each canonical URL; document reachability + cert/redirect signatures + search-form URL pattern.
method_summary.tier_3_site_restricted_search: WebSearch site-restricted queries with Cihanşah / Hakîkî / Karakoyunlu against each portal domain. Captures records that are statically indexed by Google but bypasses JS-rendered SPA search forms and cert-issue WebFetch failures.

reachability.https_www: CERT_ERROR ('unable to verify the first certificate'); consistent across VPN-on and VPN-off
reachability.verdict: CERT_WALLED_TO_WEBFETCH; site is live per Google indexing but cert chain blocks WebFetch

queries_executed.query: site:yazmalar.gov.tr 'Cihanşah' OR 'Hakîkî' OR 'Cihan Şah' OR 'Karakoyunlu' divan
queries_executed.outcome: Zero indexed pages match Cihanşah-related terms

portals.verdict: PROBED_NEGATIVE_VIA_SITE_RESTRICTED_SEARCH; residual gap for Playwright cert-ignore pass + direct search-form exercise. Indirect coverage via Islamisation DB (islam-anatolia.ac.uk) suggests Cihanşah witnesses surfaced via Turkish institutional collections are already in v1.0 register.

portals.portal_name: Türkiye Yazma Eserler Kurumu Başkanlığı (yek.gov.tr parent)

reachability.verdict: CERT_ERROR; behaves identically to yazmalar.gov.tr child portal

portals.verdict: INFERRED_NEGATIVE; the parent ministry portal does not host its own manuscript catalogue beyond what is at yazmalar.gov.tr

portals.portal_name: ISAM Kütüphane (Center for Islamic Studies, Istanbul)

reachability.kutuphane_isam_org_tr: REACHABLE; HTTP 200; Turkish-language Yordam-based catalogue interface; 10 search fields (Eser Adı, Yazar, Konu Başlığı, Dili, etc.)
reachability.katalog_isam_org_tr_yordam: form action URL pattern surfaced; query parameter q=*

queries_executed.outcome: Zero indexed pages match Cihanşah-related terms across either katalog.isam.org.tr or kutuphane.isam.org.tr

portals.verdict: PROBED_NEGATIVE; ISAM Yordam-based catalogue does not appear to host a Cihanşah Hakîkî record indexed by Google. Direct Yordam search via Playwright is a residual gap.

portals.portal_name: Milli Kütüphane Dijital Kütüphane Yazma Eserler (Ankara National Library, Manuscripts Division)

reachability.landing_page: REACHABLE; HTTP 200; Turkish-language interface; advanced search exposed

queries_executed.query: site:mkutup.gov.tr OR site:dijital-kutuphane.mkutup.gov.tr 'Cihanşah' OR 'Hakîkî' OR 'Karakoyunlu' yazma
queries_executed.outcome: All results are browse-listing pages (manuscripts/catalog/list, periodicals catalogs, authority indexes); no actual Cihanşah record surfaced

portals.v1_register_overlap_note: Ankara Milli Kütüphane A 5252 is ALREADY in v1.0 register (witness_id: ankara_milli_kutuphane_a_5252), surfaced via Islamisation DB filiations panel (TK_Mil_A_5252 slug), not via dijital-kutuphane.mkutup.gov.tr direct. The site-restricted search not finding it is consistent with the Islamisation DB being the surfacing channel rather than the Milli Kütüphane public-facing catalogue.
portals.verdict: PROBED_NEGATIVE_NEW_HITS; A 5252 already-registered via Islamisation DB. /authority/papertypelist endpoint flagged as v2.0 codicology resource.

portals.portal_name: Diyanet İşleri Başkanlığı Kütüphanesi Yazma Eserler (yazmaeserler.diyanet.gov.tr)

reachability.landing_page: REACHABLE; self-hosted manuscript catalogue with Yordam-like search interface; record URL pattern /details?id=<num>&materialType=YE

queries_executed.query: site:yazmaeserler.diyanet.gov.tr OR site:kutuphane.diyanet.gov.tr 'Cihanşah' OR 'Hakîkî' yazma divan
queries_executed.outcome: All results are Ottoman religious / literary works (Kânûnnâme, İrşâdü's-sârî, Risâle fî beyân-ı merâtîbi'l-mevcûdât, et-Risâle fî esrâri'l-hurûf, er-Risâletü'ş-şemsiyye, etc.); none mention Cihanşah / Hakîkî

portals.hurufi_adjacency_note_for_v2: One Diyanet result is `[er-Risâle fî esrâri'l-hurûf] / [رساله فی اسرار الحروف]` ('Epistle on the Secrets of Letters') indexed as id=931 with materialType=YE. This is a Hurufi text. Per v1.0 mecmûʿa-Nesîmî-adjacency heuristic (which surfaced Ankara MK A 5252 + Konya Hacı Bektaş BY0000010729), Diyanet Hurufi holdings are a v2.0 mecmûʿa-mining surface worth dedicated probe.

portals.portal_name: Bursa İl Halk Kütüphanesi + provincial Sufi tekke holdings (catalogued via yazmalar.gov.tr cluster)
portals.yusuf_hakiki_homonym_risk_assessment: Yusuf Hakîkî Bursavi (d. 893 AH / 1487 CE) taught at Bursa; the Bursa İl Halk Kütüphanesi and Bektaşi-affiliated tekke collections are the PRIMARY false-positive surface for Cihanşah Hakîkî searches in Ottoman catalogues. Per v1.0 register Konya Hacı Bektaş BY0000010729 entry (witness_id: konya_haci_bektas_by0000010729), the existing register flags this homonym ambiguity directly and marks the Konya record as 'candidate_probably_non_cihansah' precisely because Hakîkî's position in the alphabetical poet-list does NOT show Hurufi-cluster adjacency to Nesîmî/Hatâî/Şah İsmail.
portals.verdict: INFERRED_NEGATIVE_VIA_V1_PRIOR; Bursa + Bektaşi probing would primarily surface Yusuf Hakîkî Bursavi hits, not Cihanşah Qaraqoyunlu. Direct probe would require yazmalar.gov.tr Playwright pass + Hurufi-adjacency analysis per v1.0 methodology.

summary.v1_register_impact: ZERO new witnesses. The Turkish institutional Cihanşah Hakîkî surface is saturated by v1.0 register entries already sourced via Islamisation DB (islam-anatolia.ac.uk): suleymaniye_fatih_3808, ankara_dtcf_ismail_saib_1_2221, ankara_milli_kutuphane_a_5252, konya_haci_bektas_by0000010729. Turkish public-facing portals (yazmalar, ISAM, Milli Kütüphane, Diyanet) do not appear to add to this surface in site-restricted indexing.
residual_gaps: yazmalar.gov.tr Playwright cert-ignore pass + direct search-form exercise across all Yusuf Hakîkî homonym disambiguation variants
ISAM katalog.isam.org.tr/yordam/?q=Cihanşah direct query (Yordam GET form may bypass Google indexing latency)
Diyanet yazmaeserler.diyanet.gov.tr Hurufi-adjacency mining for v2.0 mecmûʿa-discovery scope
Milli Kütüphane /authority/papertypelist endpoint enumeration for v2.0 codicology surface
methodological_findings: Site-restricted Google indexing is a Playwright substitute with a known false-negative class for JS-rendered SPA catalogues. The 0-hit pattern across 4 Turkish institutional portals is suggestive but not definitive of 'no Cihanşah record exists in these databases'.

Islamisation DB (islam-anatolia.ac.uk) is the canonical Anatolian Cihanşah witness-discovery surface; Turkish public-facing portals appear to host the same records under different institutional fronts.

Yusuf Hakîkî Bursavi homonym risk is concentrated in Bursa + Bektaşi tekke collections; v1.0 register's Konya Hacı Bektaş BY0000010729 entry already documents the disambiguation methodology (Hurufi-cluster proximity vs alphabetical-list adjacency).
